Ahh ok wonder why i got no reply.. well thanks matt :)

-pat

On Thu, 8 Mar 2001, Matt Heckaman wrote:

> -----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----
> Hash: SHA1
> 
> Okay - tests out fine for me.
> 
> Sorry about dropping the ball on this one, since I stopped using netscape
> in favour of mozilla I've kind of fell behind on netscape plugins..
> 
> Pat: If you'd like to take over on maintainer of this port that's fine
> with me, feel free to. Sorry that my old email doesn't work anymore, but
> it was cut when the .ca registrar allowed us to register .ca names instead
> of the second levels we had before. :)
> 
> Cheers,
> Matt
>
